source_label: Anchore OSS Docs — "Grype (rhymes with hype) is an open-source vulnerability scanner"
notes: Grype is Anchore's open-source vulnerability scanner for container images, filesystems and SBOMs, the companion to Syft. Anchore's official docs spell it out: "Grype (rhymes with hype)" — so it is simply the word "gripe". The y-spelling misleads readers into "grip", "GRIP-ee" or a French-looking "gree-PAY", all of which are wrong.
